selected_important_turn.text: Would I be able to take 2 firewood and 3 waters and then you take the res?
selected_important_turn.why_important: This is the deal-defining allocation proposal from YOU — it directly claims the agent's top-priority items and frames the split. It determined the eventual deal (the opponent accepted) and therefore strongly shaped outcomes, fairness perceptions, and how cooperative vs zero-sum the interaction became.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: Responding to the opponent's proself offer with another proself offer locked the exchange into a competitive frame (proself→proself). That can look aggressive and risks damaging perceived fairness and relationship even if it secures the allocation. It also missed an opportunity to open integrative trades or to elicit the opponent's priorities/rationales to craft a mutually better package.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Soften and reframe this move: instead of a firm claim, use an information-seeking or trade-based framing (e.g., ask about their priorities, propose a specific trade-off that gives them something they value in return, or justify why you need those items). Offer multiple package options or ask whether they would prefer more food in exchange for giving up some firewood. That shifts from zero-sum claiming to collaborative problem-solving.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase (by opening room for package trades and side-concessions)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase (less appearance of grabbing; more balanced trade-offs)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: maybe slightly lower short-term (more discussion) but higher long-term (more durable agreement)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.relationship: improve (less adversarial, more respectful and understanding)

value2reason.Low: I can stay hydrated so I can do the chores
value2reason.Medium: To stay active and energized and not to lose my face
value2reason.High: To keep me warm in low temperatures

value2reason.Low: I will need the extra food to feed the extra people who are coming with me.
value2reason.Medium: It has been really hot and I'll need to keep hydrated while hiking
value2reason.High: It has been unsually cold at night where I'm camping.

dialogue.text: Hi there!  I'm so excited to be going camping this weekend.  I haven't been able to do anything because of the pandemic.  Do you have any plans for the weekend?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: No, I don't have any plans for this weekend. Can we camp together?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: If you want to tag along, sure.  lol  I'll be heading to the mountains so it's going to be hot during the day and cold during the night.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Great, hey, I'll make you an offer, I'll keep 3 firewood, 3 food and...
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Would I be able to take 2 firewood and 3 waters and then you take the res?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I'm looking for a fair split. Would you prefer more food in exchange for some firewood, or would you like to take the water? I value firewood most, but I'm open to trade.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I value firewood the most, so I’d prefer to secure at least 2 firewood packages. If you’re okay with 1 food package in exchange, we can split the rest fairly. What do you think?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I’d be happy to trade 1 food package for 1 firewood package. That way, I can get the firewood I need while still giving you something valuable. What do you think?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Let’s finalize this. I’ll take 2 firewood, 1 food, and 1 water. You get the remaining 1 firewood, 2 food, and 2 water. It’s fair and covers all packages.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I agree to the split. I’ll take 1 firewood, 2 food, and 2 water. You have 2 firewood, 1 food, and 1 water. Let’s head out and enjoy the trip!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Deal confirmed. Final split: I have 2 firewood, 1 food, and 1 water. You have 1 firewood, 2 food, and 2 water. Safe travels!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1
